title: SPINE Self-Execution Bridge
Add OpenRouter and Local OpenAI-Compatible LLM Providers
description: Add OpenRouterProvider and LocalOpenAIProvider classes to spine/providers/llm.py. Both use OpenAI-compatible API structure. Update spine/providers/__init__.py to export new providers. Add model definitions to spine/models/__init__.py.

title: Implement File Write Guard with Reservation System
description: Implement file reservation mechanism in spine/hive/reservations.py. Add reserve/release workflow with ownership tracking in spine/providers/storage.py. Add FileWriteGuard class with diff verification.

title: Implement Git Workflow for Branch, Commit, and PR
description: Extend spine/core/persistence.py with git operations: branch creation, commit workflow, configurable remote push, and GitHub PR creation via API.

title: Integrate Providers, File Guard, and Git into State Machine
description: Depends on providers task, file guard task, and git task

title: Wire CLI to Load spine.yaml and Inject Providers
description: Modify spine/cli.py to load config from .spine/config.yaml, parse provider configuration, instantiate providers, and inject into SpineStateMachine workflow.

title: SPINE Implementation Plan: Build Core Harness from Specs
description: Completed all 8 feature implementation tasks: models centralization, state machine error paths, provider enhancements, SwarmMail, DAG executor, LLM-powered agents, persistence layer, and conflict/notify/plugin/CLI systems. 400 tests passing.

title: Centralize data models in spine/models/
description: Implemented centralized data models in spine/models/ with types.py, enums.py, dag.py

title: State machine error paths + entry/exit conditions + DAG hooks
description: Added error transitions, entry/exit conditions, DAG hooks, and error state tracking

title: Provider enhancements: async + config loading + fallback chains
description: Implemented async generate methods, ProviderFallbackChain, and async config loading

title: SwarmMail: persistent actor-model event log
description: Enhanced SwarmMail with acknowledgment, replay, filtering, and robust JSONL persistence

title: Sub-phase DAG executor with wave-based parallel scheduling
description: Added wave size limits, resource quotas, progress tracking, cancellation support

title: LLM-powered swarm agents + gate enforcement
description: Added streaming support, gate enforcement, CriticAgent, and QualityGate

title: Persistence: ContinuityManager + Learning + Git integration
description: Enhanced ContinuityManager with learning, Git auto-commits, and checkpoint swarm state

title: Conflict resolution + NotifyProvider + Plugin system + CLI enhancements
description: Fixed ConflictResolver, added Slack/Email NotifyProviders, plugin system, CLI commands

title: SPINE Implementation Plan - Detailed Roadmap
description: Planning phase tasks closed as implementation was completed directly. All features implemented: centralized models, state machine with error handling, provider async support, SwarmMail, DAG executor, LLM agents, persistence layer, conflict resolution, and CLI enhancements.

title: Verify both providers can be instantiated and work
Debug vLLM installation and pip dependencies
description: Debug vLLM git clone and pip installation. Check use_existing_torch.py, requirements/rocm.txt dependencies, amd_smi package installation. Previous phase (ROCm tarball) completed successfully.

title: Add reasoning_effort parameter to OpenAI-compatible LLM providers
description: Add reasoning_effort parameter (low/medium/high) to requests using OpenAI compatible APIs. Value set per-provider in config.yaml, with per-request override support.

title: Add tests for reasoning_effort functionality
Add reasoning_effort parameter to LLM providers
Debug flash-attention build for gfx12
description: Debug flash-attention build from enable-ck-gfx12 branch with FLASH_ATTENTION_TRITON_AMD_ENABLE=TRUE for gfx12 compatibility. Previous phases: ROCm extraction verified, vLLM fixes applied.
